creator: arnt@gulbrandsen.priv.no
text:
Created attachment 188955
Ports tree patch to add this support to Sendmail.

Hi,

RFC6530 and friends define use of UTF8 for email addresses. Postfix and Gmail have supported it for three years now, Exim has supported it for two, etc.

This adds a port option to Sendmail, sponsored by CNNIC.

Anyone curious about the extensions may read http://rant.gulbrandsen.priv.no/eai/one-minute-guide
